title: Recipe Execution Framework
purpose: Implement executable governance recipe framework to standardize operational workflows, reduce procedural ambiguity, support deterministic recovery, and enable guided execution.
architectural_constraints: Machine-readable first: JSON is canonical source
Markdown documentation generated from canonical recipe definitions
Recipes must support prerequisites, validation, steps, recovery, and rollback

deliverables.description: Markdown reflection generator from JSON recipes

acceptance_criteria: 7 recipe categories defined: planning, implementation, recovery, investigations, runtime health, governance repair, deployment readiness
Markdown reflections generated deterministically from JSON
Recipe executor validates prerequisites before execution
Recovery paths defined for all non-trivial recipes
Rollback guidance included for state-mutating recipes

failure_modes.scenario: Recipe execution mutates state without rollback
failure_modes.mitigation: Mandatory rollback guidance for state-mutating recipes, snapshot before execution
Schema versioning, backward compatibility checks, validator CI gate
